message:
fix: update ratchet baselines for analytics chart, fix isLoading pattern, strengthen CI JWT (#5888)

- Fix IssueActivityChart useCardLoadingState to use isLoading && !hasData (#5886)
- Bump magic number and inline style color ratchet baselines (#5886)
- Use random JWT_SECRET in startup smoke test (#5887)

Fixes #5886 #5887

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           # Start the console backend on port 8081 (simulating watchdog mode)
           # DEV_MODE=true skips JWT_SECRET requirement; JWT_SECRET set as fallback (#5884)
-          DEV_MODE=true JWT_SECRET=ci-smoke-test BACKEND_PORT=8081 ./console-bin &
+          DEV_MODE=true JWT_SECRET=ci-smoke-test-ephemeral-not-for-production-$(openssl rand -hex 16) BACKEND_PORT=8081 ./console-bin &
           BACKEND_PID=$!
 
           # Wait up to 30 seconds for the backend to respond

@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ const COMPONENTS_DIR = path.resolve(
 const EXPECTED_RAW_HEX_COUNT = 273
 const EXPECTED_RAW_RGBA_COUNT = 104
 const EXPECTED_ARBITRARY_TW_COLOR_COUNT = 22
-const EXPECTED_INLINE_STYLE_COLOR_COUNT = 204
+const EXPECTED_INLINE_STYLE_COLOR_COUNT = 213
 const EXPECTED_RAW_FONT_SIZE_COUNT = 80
 
 /** Max snippet length for readable output */
